intro: Zaluzianskya chasmanthiflora, commonly known as the night-scented Zaluzianskya, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its reported health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Z. chasmanthiflora include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been found to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Z. chasmanthiflora is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, as well as being used in the preparation of essential oils and dried flower remedies.
